name: Stickman Climb
description: You are in charge of a stickman in a box with a pickaxe in its hand, and your objective is to reach the flag at the finish line of every level using the balancing powers of your strong arms and mighty pickaxe! The road to victory is paved with deadly spikes, so utilize every checkpoint to keep your progress. Use the laws of physics to your advantage and you will master this game in no time. Reach the pinnacle of fun with Stickman Climb!
instructions: Use your axe to move around the stage Move - Left Right arrow keys
